title: aster glaucus
intro: Aster glaucus, also known as Purple Coneflower or Wood's Blue Aster, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aster glaucus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from colds and respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Aster glaucus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves of the plant to extract its medicinal properties.
